\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#}!/usr/bin/perl

\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \hrulefill

\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \centerline{\bf Towers of Hanoi (Perl)} 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#}
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \begin{quote} 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \noindent 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ This program gives an answer to the following famous problem (towers of 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ Hanoi). 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ There is a legend that when one of the temples in Hanoi was constructed, 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ three poles were erected and a tower consisting of 64 golden discs was 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ arranged on one pole, their sizes decreasing regularly from bottom to top. 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ The monks were to move the tower of discs to the opposite pole, moving 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ only one at a time, and never putting any size disc above a smaller one. 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ The job was to be done in the minimum numbers of moves. What strategy for 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ moving discs will accomplish this optimum transfer? 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \end{quote} 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#}
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ % end of TeX mode 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#}
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \hrulefill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \hrulefill\ hanoi.pl \ \hrulefill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}use{\tt\mc \ }strict;

\noindent
\mbox{}use{\tt\mc \ }warnings;

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}my{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}ARRAY{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }8;{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} disc count
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}my{\tt\mc \ }@disc;{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} disc data storage
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}for{\tt\mc \ }my{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}i{\tt\mc \ }(0..2){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}disc[{\tt\$}i]{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }[(0){\tt\mc \ }x{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}ARRAY];

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\char'175}

\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}sub{\tt\mc \ }init{\tt\_}array{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} initialize disc data
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }for{\tt\mc \ }my{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}j{\tt\mc \ }(0..{\tt\$}ARRAY{\tt -}1){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}disc[0][{\tt\$}j]{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}ARRAY{\tt\mc \ }{\tt -}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}j;

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}disc[1][{\tt\$}j]{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }0;

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}disc[2][{\tt\$}j]{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }0;

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'175}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\char'175}

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}my{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}counter{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }0;{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} move counter
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}my{\tt\mc \ }@ptr{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }(0,{\tt\mc \ }0,{\tt\mc \ }0);{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} stack pointers
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}sub{\tt\mc \ }print{\tt\_}result{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} print current state
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}counter++;

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }print{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "}{\tt -}{\tt -}{\tt -}{\tt\$}{\tt\char'173}counter{\tt\char'175}{\tt -}{\tt -}{\tt -}{\tt\char92}n{\tt "};

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }for{\tt\mc \ }my{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}i{\tt\mc \ }(0..2){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }print{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "}[{\tt\$}i]{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "};

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }print{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "}{\tt\$}disc[{\tt\$}i][{\tt\$}j]{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "};

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }else{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}

\mbox{}sub{\tt\mc \ }move{\tt\_}one{\tt\_}disc{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} move 1 disc: pole i to pole j
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }my{\tt\mc \ }({\tt\$}i,{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}j){\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }@{\tt\_};

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}ptr[{\tt\$}i]{\tt -}{\tt -};

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}disc[{\tt\$}j][{\tt\$}ptr[{\tt\$}j]]{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}disc[{\tt\$}i][{\tt\$}ptr[{\tt\$}i]];

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}ptr[{\tt\$}j]++;

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}disc[{\tt\$}i][{\tt\$}ptr[{\tt\$}i]]{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }0;

\mbox{}{\tt\char'175}

\mbox{}\hfill
